steps.title: Factor and set up the no-solution condition
steps.content:
Factor the left side:
$$-8x+48px=(-8+48p)x$$
The equation is $(-8+48p)x=96$. Since $96\ne0$, no solution happens only when the $x$-coefficient is $0$, producing the false statement $0=96$.

steps.title: Solve for p
steps.content:
Set the coefficient equal to $0$:
$$-8+48p=0$$
$$48p=8$$
$$p=\frac{1}{6}$$
That matches Choice D — $\frac{1}{6}$.
